title: Glass Bottom Boat [32x]
description: Faithful Version of Xeadas' Glass-Bottom Boats resource pack.
body:
## Glass Bottom Boats 

This resource pack is [Faithful](https://faithfulpack.net) Version of [Xeadas' Glass-Bottom Boats](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/xeadas-glass-bottom-boats/).  I have also converted the 2D Boat item texture to 3D item texture.

#
Note - No Optifine Needed & Use this above Faithful Texture Pack.
